M1_financial.available_when: predictor (year t) financial statement has a verified available_at on or before the prediction cutoff
M1_financial.target_leakage_rule: target (year t+1) financial values are NEVER available at prediction time; using them is leakage
M1_financial.unavailable_when: available_at is missing, unknown, or after the cutoff

M2_market.available_when: market series window closes before the prediction cutoff; all returns/volatility/liquidity from pre-cutoff data only
M2_market.target_leakage_rule: market data from year t+1 is NEVER available at prediction time
M2_market.unavailable_when: market window extends past the cutoff or no verified available_at for the market series

M3_macro.available_when: macro series publication date is on or before the prediction cutoff; only official/pre-announced data
M3_macro.target_leakage_rule: macro revisions released after the cutoff are NEVER used
M3_macro.unavailable_when: macro publication date is after the cutoff or unknown

M4_audit_governance.available_when: audit report / governance disclosure has a verified available_at on or before the prediction cutoff
M4_audit_governance.target_leakage_rule: audit opinion for year t+1 is NEVER available at prediction time
M4_audit_governance.unavailable_when: audit/governance available_at is missing, unknown, or after the cutoff
